_comment: Assets a plain shell cannot fetch (registration form / EULA / login). scripts/setup checks presence and lists missing ones in tmp/setup-state.json; the Claude path (docs/onboarding.md) drives the browser MCP to fetch them. Every GitHub-release DFIR binary is curl-able and handled by scripts/install-dfir-tools.sh instead, so it does NOT belong here. To add a binary later, use kind:binary with destination.dir ~/.local/bin and env_var $<TOOL>_BIN.

tools.name: SANS SIFT Workstation OVA

browser.steps: NEEDS-LIVE-CONFIRMATION: capture the real SANS form fields, EULA control, login wall, and resolved .ova href in a human-supervised recon dry-run before trusting these steps. Until then, default to manual_fallback.
browser.extract: puppeteer_evaluate(): resolve the .ova download href (direct or signed CDN URL)

tools.manual_fallback: Open the landing_url, complete the SANS form/login/EULA, download the OVA, and save it as sift-<version>.ova at the repo root (or set OVA_PATH=/path/to/your.ova). Then re-run: bash scripts/setup.
